name: ae
description: Agentic Engineering workflow for Claude Code. Multi-agent TDD, cross-family review (Claude + Codex + Gemini), structured planning and analysis.

cross_family_primary.description: Primary cross-family model family (codex or gemini)

default_effort.description: Default reasoning effort for AE agents (low, medium, high)

max_turns_default.description: Default max turns for AE agents

args: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/mcp-servers/gemini" && npm install --omit=dev --silent >&2 && exec node dist/index.js
